_provenance.notes: v1 HAND-CURATED proof rows for the cost-layer golden set (Dragon scimitar divergence; obby maul non-coin currency). Bulk wiki sourcing (Bucket storeline ~6.2k rows) is a DISCLOSED v1 follow-up; no live wiki fetch happens during build. Obby maul Tokkul base price = 75001 (65001 with Karamja gloves -- a deferred account-STATE cost modifier, not modeled in v1; see research/currency-model.md). Gate fields {audience,pricing_basis,realization_channel,requires_ge} present on every row; iron-gate discipline (shop rows are audience=both, requires_ge=false). Task 7 appends the Guam seed row. The Eye of newt (item:221) and empty Vial (item:229) rows are the iron-acquirable potion secondaries: ironmen buy these from NPC herblore/general shops (Betty's Magic Emporium sells Eye of newt for 3 coins; Jatix's Herblore Shop sells an empty Vial for 2 coins -- fixed shop sell prices = the item base Value, not GE prices), then fill the vial at any water source for free (modeled in recipes.json as Vial of water from 1x Vial). These two rows + the vial-of-water recipe make the Attack-potion golden chain genuinely iron-priceable (spec success-criterion #3).

records.source: https://oldschool.runescape.wiki/w/Eye_of_newt -- fixed shop sell price = item base Value 3 coins (Betty's Magic Emporium, Port Sarim); wiki-verified 2026-06-19
https://oldschool.runescape.wiki/w/Vial -- empty vial fixed shop sell price = item base Value 2 coins (Jatix's Herblore Shop, Taverley); wiki-verified 2026-06-19
